_note: Threshold tightened from 90 → 66 (60 SERP-display target + 10 % tolerance) on 2026-05-05 alongside the buildTitleWithBrand drop-brand-instead-of-truncate fix in build-plugins/shared/titleSuffix.ts. The simulated post-fix count on the existing dist/ was 14,757 — most offenders are job-board pages whose headline alone (job title + company + city + year) exceeds 66 char even without the brand. This baseline is a conservative ceiling that lets the first CI build pass; run `npm run audit:title-length:rebaseline` after the first clean build to lock the precise floor. Counts can only go DOWN. Per-feature/per-locale buckets are seeded generously — any new bucket that appears with non-zero count will still be flagged by the ratchet.
